news.headline: Apollo to disclose Q1 2025 financials on May 2, 2025, before NYSE opening. Management to discuss results at 8:30 am ET. Webcast on ir.apollo.com.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Apollo (NYSE: APO) announced their intentions to disclose their financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 2, 2025, before the start of trading on the NYSE. The company's management will discuss these results at 8:30 am ET through a public webcast on Apollo’s Investor Relations website at ir.apollo.com. Interested individuals can access a replay of the webcast one hour after its conclusion.

news.headline: Workhorse Group regains Nasdaq compliance with $1.00 minimum bid price per share requirement.
news.summary: In Cincinnati today, Workhorse Group Inc. (Nasdaq: WKHS) declared that it has met the Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share as per Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The American tech company, known for its efforts in advancing zero-emission commercial vehicles, received formal notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC confirming this compliance.

news.headline: Robinhood to announce Q1 2025 results on April 30, 2025, video call discussing results at 2:00 PM PT/5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets, Inc. has declared that its first quarter financial results for 2025 will be unveiled on April 30, 2025, after markets shut. A video call to analyze the outcomes is scheduled at 2:00 PM PT / 5:00 PM ET on the same day. Interested parties can access the video call and related documents on investors.robinhood.com. The event will be live broadcasted on YouTube and X.com through @RobinhoodApp. A replay and transcript of the call will also be accessible on investors.robinhood.com post the event.

news.headline: GlobalFoundries to host conference call on May 6, 2025, at 8:30 am ET to review first quarter 2025 financial results.
news.summary: Malta, New York - GlobalFoundries (NASDAQ: GFS) has disclosed plans to conduct a conference call on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET subsequent to unveiling the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures fall before "Liberation Day" tariffs; Nvidia, Tesla stocks decline.
news.summary: The futures of the Dow Jones decreased on Wednesday before the implementation of President Trump's tariffs on "Liberation Day." There was a sell-off of Nvidia and Tesla stocks.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs warns of US stock decline risk, but possible Trump/Fed policy change may spark recovery. S&P 500 vulnerability due to market correction potential; drawdown probability high since January. Macro environment worsening, deeper declines predicted.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs Research has warned that the S&P 500 could face deeper declines due to the deteriorating macroeconomic environment. Christian Mueller-Glissmann, leading asset allocation researcher, highlighted that the equity drawdown probability has not peaked yet. The firm's equity drawdown risk model forecasts the likelihood of the S&P 500 falling, indicating a potential for further declines. They have been predicting elevated risk since January. However, Goldman Sachs believes that a "major policy pivot" by the Trump administration or the central bank could help the markets recover.

news.headline: Chile President Boric criticizes Trump for acting like an ‘Emperor,' reported by Bloomberg.
LGIM acquires UK bond derivatives, offering uncommon 6% return to hedge risk due to low interest rates.

US stock futures fall after 3-day decline; Goldman Sachs predicts 35% recession risk, 15% average tariffs. Market indices down significantly. Fed likely to maintain current interest rates through May meeting. Stocks drop with Nasdaq now 13.24%, S&P 9.22%, and Dow Jones 7.74% lower. Futures: Nasdaq -1.24%, S&P -0.85%, Dow -0.57%.Notable drops in SPY and QQQ. Key indexes perform poorly, inflation up, AAR Corp. shares down 16%. Market jitters with upcoming reciprocal tariffs and inflation concerns. Louis Navellier remains optimistic for April.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures dipped after three days of decline, with major benchmarks like Nasdaq 100, S&P 500, and Dow Jones all lower in premarket trading. Investors are bracing for the incoming reciprocal tariffs on April 2nd, referred to as "Liberation Day" by President Trump. Goldman Sachs predicts a 35% recession risk and average reciprocal tariffs of 15% across U.S. trading partners, though exclusions could lower the impact to a 9% average. As of Friday, Nasdaq was down 13.24% from its peak, S&P 500 was 9.22% lower, and Dow Jones declined by 7.74% from its 52-week high. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.63% and the 2-year at 3.88%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF fell in premarket. Consumer discretionary, communication services, and IT stocks dipped, while utilities rose. Key indexes like Nasdaq Composite, S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Russell 2000 also saw declines. Analysts, such as Louis Navellier, see potential for excitement in April amidst the uncertainty surrounding reciprocal tariffs.

news.headline: OpenAI demonstrates excessive wealth is a tangible concept, as reported on Bloomberg.com.
Wall Street surprised by Trump's commitment to seismic policy in 2024 campaign. Policy risks looming in Trump 2.0.
news.summary: Financial analysts on Wall Street were prepared for President Trump's second term to be characterized by strong rhetoric and unpredictability. However, they were surprised by his dedication to pursuing the groundbreaking policy agenda that formed a central part of his 2024 presidential campaign.

news.headline: Elon Musk remains optimistic about Tesla stock despite DOGE backlash. Stock down nearly 50% since December, costing Musk $200 billion.
news.summary: The involvement of Elon Musk in the Trump Administration has led to negative consequences for him and his businesses. Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) has seen a decline in sales and faced vandalism due to the impact on its brand in key markets. The company's stock has plummeted by nearly half since December, resulting in the loss of billions of dollars in shareholder value. Elon Musk alone has suffered a $200 billion hit. In response to Tesla's struggles, President Trump hosted an event for the company at the White House. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Novo Holdings reports record Total Income and Investment Returns of DKK 60 billion (€8.0 billion) in 2024. The Investment Portfolio generated a return of 18.0%, up from 9.4% in 2023. Total Assets under Management at the close of 2024 were DKK 1,060 billion (€142 billion), down from 1,114 billion (€149 billion) in 2023. Capital Investments closed 2024 with DKK 95 billion (€13 billion) of Investment Assets, generating profits of DKK 13 billion (€1.7 billion). Life Science Investments closed the year with DKK 134 billion (€18 billion) of Investment Assets, generating profits of DKK 24 billion (€3.2 billion). 43 new companies were added to the Investment Portfolio in 2024, totaling 181 companies by year-end. Novo Holdings executed a $16.5 billion (DKK 118 billion) acquisition of Catalent, a global CDMO, the largest healthcare buyout in 2024.
news.summary: Novo Holdings reported its financial results for 2024, with Total Income and Investment Returns reaching DKK 60 billion (€8.0 billion), up from DKK 31 billion (€4.2 billion) in 2023. The Investment Portfolio generated an impressive return of 18.0%, compared to 9.4% in the previous year, resulting in a Total Investment Return of 19.2%. Total Assets under Management at the end of 2024 were DKK 1,060 billion (€142 billion), down from 1,114 billion (€149 billion) in 2023 due to a decline in the market value of Novo Nordisk. Novo Holdings' Capital Investments team closed the year with DKK 95 billion (€13 billion) of Investment Assets and profits of DKK 13 billion (€1.7 billion). In Life Science Investments, the team closed the year with DKK 134 billion (€18 billion) of Investment Assets and profits of DKK 24 billion (€3.2 billion). Novo Holdings made a significant $16.5 billion (DKK 118 billion) acquisition of Catalent in 2024, leading the largest healthcare buyout globally. This acquisition aims to foster innovation and sustainable value creation in the life sciences industry. Novo Holdings' Strategy 2030 includes operational scaling and an emphasis on sustainable investments for the future.

news.headline: CoinShares XBT Provider AB (Publ) releases 2024 Audited Financial Statements for the Year Ended 31 December with positive results.
Biora Therapeutics completes restructuring, now a privately held company with funding for BioJet™ platform development.
news.summary: After undergoing restructuring, Biora has emerged as a privately held company. The company has secured long-term financing that will be used to expedite the development of the BioJet™ platform. This move signifies a renewed focus on innovation and growth for Biora.

news.headline: Employers are advocating for legislation to address the decrease in immigrant workers as deportations rise.
news.summary: As the number of deportations increase, businesses that depend on immigrant labor are advocating for new laws to maintain a steady and legal influx of foreign workers. These companies are emphasizing the necessity of ensuring a sufficient workforce from overseas to sustain their operations.

news.headline: Private-sector hiring increased according to ADP, despite a rise in US economic uncertainty.

Circle's revenue grows by 16%, but profitability falls due to higher costs and increased redemptions. EBITDA dropped by 78% and net income by 66%. Redemptions surged to $165 billion in 2023 from $98 billion in 2022. Users rotating capital in and out of the stablecoin for optimization yield.
news.summary: Circle Internet Financial, the company responsible for USD Coin (USDC), is experiencing a varied financial outlook as it prepares for its upcoming public listing. Their revenue has increased by 16%, but profitability has decreased due to higher costs and a rise in redemptions. Matthew Sigel from VanEck analyzed their recently filed S-1 prospectus and highlighted the disparity between Circle's revenue growth and declining bottom-line performance. Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) dropped by 78%, while net income fell by 66% despite strong revenue expansion. This decrease is attributed to escalating costs and a more competitive market. Circle saw redemptions spike to $165 billion in 2023 from $98 billion in 2022, indicating users are increasingly moving capital in and out of the stablecoin to maximize returns. Sigel also mentioned a decrease in margins due to these factors.

news.headline: YASH Technologies reaches Platinum Partner status with Salesforce, marking a milestone achievement in service delivery.
news.summary: YASH Technologies has achieved a significant milestone by becoming one of the top Salesforce partners. This leading global technology services and systems integration company based in EAST MOLINE, Ill. shared the news on April 2, 2025. The company has demonstrated excellence in service delivery, propelling it to the elite tier of Salesforce partners. This achievement highlights YASH Technologies' commitment to providing exceptional solutions and services.

news.headline: 1GLOBAL launches Message+ for financial institutions to ensure compliance in SMS and WhatsApp comms.
news.summary: Amsterdam-based company 1GLOBAL has recently introduced Message+, a new compliance service aimed at financial institutions. This new service includes SMS and WhatsApp capture capabilities integrated with MS Teams. Message+ is designed to enhance compliance processes within the financial sector, marking an important development for 1GLOBAL in expanding its services.

news.headline: TRUMPF qualifies 6K Additive titanium powder on TruPrint Systems; made from sustainable sources.
news.summary: TRUMPF has officially welcomed a new qualified partner, Qualification, who has introduced a sustainable feedstock powder to their lineup. This addition marks a significant step in TRUMPF's initiative to enhance their global prominence in producing advanced materials for additive manufacturing. The collaboration with 6K Additive and the German company offers a boost to TRUMPF's capabilities. The news was released on April 2, 2025, from Burgettstown, Pennsylvania.

news.headline: Cory Booker's 25-hour speech was effective, drawing attention in the media.
Appili's President and CEO will join Aditxt's CEO for weekly update on April 4, 2025.
Superior Group of Companies’ CEO Michael Benstock featured on Smart Money Circle podcast, available on YouTube and company website.
news.summary: Chairman and CEO Michael Benstock of Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) was recently featured on the Smart Money Circle podcast by Adam Sarhan. The interview, now accessible on the Smart Money Circle YouTube channel and Superior Group of Companies' website, provides insights for investors. The podcast was released on April 2, 2025, and aims to offer valuable information about the company to potential investors and the public. Visit https://ir.superiorgroupofcompanies.com/presentations for more details.

news.headline: Stratasys launches PolyJet ToughONE™ White for functional prototyping & end-use parts. Exceptional quality & ease of use.
news.summary: Stratasys Ltd. has unveiled PolyJet ToughONE™ White, a new material designed for durable functional prototyping and end-use parts on its high-end platforms. The material offers ease of use, full-color realism, and multi-material versatility. Marked as a milestone in 3D printing, PolyJet ToughONE™ White is positioned as the go-to solution for customers seeking tough and durable prints. By expanding their PolyJet printing capabilities, Stratasys aims to offer enhanced value and utility to its users.

news.headline: UFC partners with Meta, using leading technologies to engage hundreds of millions of fans worldwide. #UFC #Meta
news.summary: In Las Vegas, UFC, a top mixed martial arts organization under TKO Group Holdings (NYSE: TKO), has revealed a new alliance with Meta. The partnership involves a multiyear agreement aimed at enhancing engagement with millions of UFC fans globally. Meta, UFC's inaugural Official Fan Technology Partner, will work together with UFC to utilize Meta's tech platforms and products such as Meta AI, Meta Glasses, Meta Quest, and Facebook. This collaboration seeks to provide unparalleled interactions for fans worldwide.

news.headline: EMA webinar discusses OpenTelemetry's role in IT performance. Over 68% IT leaders know it, 50% integrate it.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) has shown that more than 68% of IT executives have knowledge of OpenTelemetry. Nearly 50% of these leaders are currently incorporating OpenTelemetry into their day-to-day operations. The findings highlight the growing importance and adoption of this technology within the industry. The research was conducted in Lafayette, Colo., and the results were released on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Lake Lawn Resort introduces new menu with vibrant flavors under talented chef. Located in Delavan, Wisconsin.
news.summary: As summer approaches, Lake Lawn Resort in Delavan, Wisconsin is revamping its dining offerings with fresh and exciting flavors overseen by a new culinary leader. The renowned lakeside resort is situated on the stunning Delavan Lake, and the enhancements aim to elevate the dining experience for guests. This news comes as the resort gears up for the summer season in 2025.

news.headline: Rollins, Inc. acquires Saela Holdings, LLC, a top pest management firm in strategic deal. Pro forma leverage to be under 1.0x.
news.summary: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL) has successfully completed a transaction that offers significant growth opportunities due to its highly complementary exposure to end markets. The deal was funded using a combination of cash reserves and commercial paper. Following the transaction, the pro forma leverage ratio is anticipated to be maintained below 1.0x. This achievement was announced in Atlanta on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Private sector added 155,000 jobs in March; annual pay rose 4.6%.ADP National Employment Report.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Roseland, New Jersey, a report revealed that private sector employment saw a rise of 155,000 jobs in March. Additionally, annual pay experienced a growth of 4.6 percent when compared to the previous year. The March ADP® National Employment Report™ was conducted by ADP Research in partnership with the Stanford Digital Economy.

news.headline: Pi Network's price dips, nearing all-time low at $0.6722 as supply increases. Over 126.6M PI tokens expected to unlock this month, 4.9B unlocked so far. Founder warns of excess supply affecting token value. Network urged to focus on development to compete with top 10 projects. Referral-based Pi Network allows users to earn Pi coin, launched in 2019 by Stanford grads. CEO of ByBit challenges legitimacy, calls project a scam.
news.summary: The price of social cryptocurrency Pi Network's (PI) coin has dropped to $0.6722, nearing its all-time low of $0.6152, as over 126.6 million PI tokens are set to be unlocked this month, equivalent to almost 1.87% of the circulating supply. 4.9 billion PI tokens have been unlocked so far, and an additional 1.54 billion will be unlocked in the next 12 months. Despite the recent price downturn, analyst Alex Obchakevich believes Pi Network has the potential to compete with the top 10 cryptocurrency projects in the future, but suggests they focus on project development to increase usage and interest. Pi Network, launched in 2019, allows users to earn its native token, Pi coin, through daily check-ins and a referral-based structure. The project faced accusations of being a scam by some, including ByBit CEO Ben Zhou, in late February.

news.headline: Metal Supermarkets offers $10,000 in scholarships for trade school students in the US and Canada annually.
news.summary: A leading provider of small-quantity metals worldwide, Metal Supermarkets, has revealed its support for students pursuing skilled trades. The company recently unveiled the continuation of its yearly trade school scholarship program, now in its fourth year. This initiative will benefit four trade school students from the United States and Canada. Each recipient will receive significant financial aid to assist in their pursuit of education and training in skilled trades.

news.headline: Beyond Trending celebrates 5 years of growth with 48% yearly revenue increase; offers PR giveaway.
news.summary: A PR agency in Charleston, SC, called Beyond Trending, is commemorating its 5th anniversary with significant achievements and a giveaway. The firm specializes in public relations and communication services, offering impactful storytelling to enhance visibility. The celebration marks five years since its establishment and highlights the agency's success in providing meaningful exposure. No specific numbers were mentioned in the provided information.

news.headline: Hull Street Energy closes Fund III, a prominent energy investment firm based in Washington, DC metropolitan area.
news.summary: Based in Bethesda, Maryland, on April 2, 2025, Hull Street Energy, LLC, a leading energy transition investment company based in the Washington, D.C. area, announced the successful completion of its fundraising efforts for Hull Street Energy Partners III, L.P. ("Fund III"). This fund will focus on making strategic investments in the energy sector.

news.headline: VGP NV releases final results for cash tender offer, with significant numbers disclosed.
Zeto teams up with encevis to launch NeuroPulse, an AI-powered Status Epilepticus software using 10-20 EEG.
news.summary: A medical technology company, Zeto, Inc., based in Santa Clara, California, made an announcement on April 2, 2025, regarding its innovative EEG diagnostics solutions. The company is rapidly expanding and is known for its state-of-the-art devices and cloud platform. Zeto, Inc. has integrated live bedside AI-powered features for Seizure Burden and Status Epilepticus monitoring.

news.headline: US ADP Employment Change Actual 155k (Forecast 120k, Previous 77k, Revised 84k)
Concentric AI secures new patent for AI-powered data security governance, enhancing industry lead with "Methods and Systems for Clustering Documents based on Semantic Similarity".
news.summary: Concentric AI, based in San Jose, California, has recently secured a new patent in its ongoing commitment to innovation and advancement in data security. This latest patent, titled "Methods and Systems for Clustering Documents based on Semantic Similarity," underscores the company's dedication to leveraging AI for the discovery and categorization of sensitive data. With this achievement, Concentric AI solidifies its position as a frontrunner in the industry by enhancing its intellectual property portfolio.

news.headline: LogicMonitor achieves "In Process" designation under FedRAMP, strengthening commitment to govt security.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, LogicMonitor, a top SaaS platform specializing in AI-driven data center enhancements, disclosed that its Envision platform has attained the "In Process" status in the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®). This milestone highlights LogicMonitor's engagement in the stringent FedRAMP authorization process, showcasing a dedication to providing a secure, scalable, and AI-powered observability platform.

news.headline: Revvity Signals Software introduces Signals One platform to streamline drug discovery process.
news.summary: A company based in Waltham, Massachusetts, Revvity, Inc., recently revealed plans for its software and informatics branch, Revvity Signals Software, to introduce Signals One™. This new unified software platform is an advancement based on the firm's research arsenal, aiming to simplify data handling throughout the drug discovery process. Signals One is tailored to tackle the increasing intricacies of drug modalities research by offering a comprehensive solution that merges cutting-edge research functions.

news.headline: FIS introduces Securities Finance Matching Platform in U.S., a cloud-native solution for broker-dealers with smart automated matching technology.
news.summary: Jacksonville, Florida - FIS®, a prominent financial technology company listed on the NYSE as FIS, unveiled its Securities Finance Matching Platform in the United States. This launch comes after successfully navigating the SEC filing process. The platform is cloud-based and utilizes intelligent automation for matching, enhancing the security, scalability, and cost-efficiency of securities finance for broker-dealers. This innovative solution provides U.S. broker-dealers with additional options for intelligent securities management.

news.headline: Global cinema industry projected to reach $34 billion revenue in 2025, still below 2019 levels ($42 billion). Omdia suggests using YouTubers to boost attendance.
news.summary: In 2025, the worldwide cinema industry is forecasted to bring in $34 billion in revenue, which is lower than the $42 billion it made in 2019. Maria Rua Aguete, the Head of Media & Entertainment at Omdia, discussed potential strategies at FED ESPAÑA, a prominent media event in Spain. Aguete emphasized the importance of tapping into the reach of YouTubers as a method to boost cinema attendance. This insight was shared during discussions about Audience Behavior and The Role of YouTubers in the industry.

news.headline: 104 pioneering scientists from 30 nations awarded 2025 HFSP Research Grants for life science innovation.
news.summary: The Human Frontier Science Program, based in Strasbourg, France, made a significant announcement on April 2, 2025. The organization granted a total of 104 prestigious awards to top scientists worldwide. These grants, known as the 2025 HFSP Research Grants, were distributed to researchers from 30 different countries. In addition to these awards, the program also issued the inaugural round of Accelerator Grants to further support groundbreaking research in the field of life sciences. This initiative aims to propel innovative research and facilitate new discoveries in the scientific community.

news.headline: Pimco's Ivascyn: We have turned a bit more cautious on dollar, a little underweight across portfolios.
Bruichladdich Distillery partners with James Beard Foundation on 2025 sustainability programs, involving culinary changemakers.
news.summary: Bruichladdich Distillery, known for its forward-thinking approach to Scotch whisky production, is set to support the training and education of culinary leaders at the 2025 Chef Action Summit and Chef Bootcamp for Policy and Change program. This initiative in New York aims to empower changemakers in the culinary field. Scheduled for April 2, 2025, this event will bring together a significant number of participants to receive guidance and insights.

news.headline: Valicor Environmental Services buys Affordable Waste Management, enhancing wastewater services in Midwest.
news.summary: Valicor Environmental Services, a top provider of centralized waste treatment and recycling services in North America, has recently strengthened its sustainable wastewater treatment capabilities in the Midwest. The acquisition, announced on April 2, 2025, in Monroe, Ohio, signifies a significant milestone for Valicor. This strategic move aims to enhance Valicor's services and expand its reach, showcasing its commitment to environmental sustainability. With this development, Valicor is poised to better serve its clientele and further solidify its position in the industry.

news.headline: RBI's huge cash injection leads to the largest bond rally in more than two years. #economy #RBI #finance
Rare 1950s Chief Oshkosh Crowntainer beer can fetches record-breaking $111,150 at Morean's auction.
news.summary: A unique Chief Oshkosh Crowntainer has broken the brewery advertising auction record by selling for $111,150 at Morean Auctions in BRIMFIELD, Mass., on April 2, 2025. This white Chief Oshkosh piece is the sole one of its kind to be discovered.

news.headline: Final call for $50,000 Biocodex Microbiota Foundation 2025 USA Microbiome Research Grant. Deadline May 23rd.
news.summary: The 9th annual Microbiome Grant from the Biocodex Microbiota Foundation, established by Biocodex, has a deadline of May 23rd. Researchers in the USA have until this date to apply for the grant, with the announcement made on April 2, 2025, in Bedminster, N.J. This initiative aims to support microbiome research for the year 2025.

news.headline: Everfox ULTRA gains FedRAMP "In Process" status for enhanced security measures against web threats in federal systems.
news.summary: A system called Everfox ULTRA, based in Herndon, Va., is utilizing hardware-enforced security (Hardsec) to protect federal systems from sophisticated web-based threats.
